tagline: This serverless compute release includes updates from Databricks Runtime 18.
what_it_does: This serverless compute release includes updates from Databricks Runtime 18. New features Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines streaming query ID: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines can now set the streaming query ID on demand. IP address functions (Public Preview): New SQL functions are available for working with IPv4 and IPv6 addresses and CIDR blocks, including ip host, ip cidr, ip version, ip prefix length, ip network, ip network last, ip cidr contains, ip as binary, ip as string, and try variants for null safe behavior.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: This serverless compute release includes updates from Databricks Runtime 18. New features Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines streaming query ID: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines can now set the streaming query ID on demand.
key_takeaway: This serverless compute release includes updates from Databricks Runtime 18.
